title: Add BYOP Temp Controller to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [BYOP Temp Controller](https://connor11016.github.io) to bots
- BYOP Temp Controller lets you control AI temperature and get varied responses using pollinations.ai.

Fixes #12315

gist.headline: Turning up the heat
gist.blurb: A new community app just sprouted in the Greenhouse! BYOP Temp Controller lets you dial in the AI's temperature for perfectly varied responses.
gist.summary: Added the BYOP Temp Controller app by connor11016 to the community Greenhouse, providing an interface to control AI temperature settings.
gist.impact: Users can now easily experiment with how different temperature values affect AI generation through a dedicated community tool.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an app that controls 'temperature' (AI randomness) added to the Greenhouse. Visuals: The bee mascot in a greenhouse, adjusting a retro thermostat or temperature dial on a glowing terminal. Code-plants around.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot in a digital greenhouse, adjusting a chunky retro thermostat dial on a glowing terminal. Small code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
